_instructions.defaultLocales: Locales where EVERY game returned by getAllGames may show. Keep EMPTY for strict per-game matching (a game shows only in its own listed locales).
_instructions.gameLocales: Key = Yandex appID (the number in /games/app/NUMBER), value = locales that game is actually localized in. A game shows to a player ONLY if the player's language is in this list. If nothing matches the player's language, the whole 'Other games' block is hidden.
